recurring_credits.name: Citi Travel Hotel Credit
recurring_credits.description: $100 off a single hotel stay of $500+ (excluding taxes/fees) when booked through cititravel.com. Once per calendar year, applied at booking.
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: $100 off a single hotel stay of $500 or more (excluding taxes and fees) when booked through cititravel.com... applied instantly at the time of booking

_excluded: The Reserve hotel program benefits (qualitative — varies by property)
